Provenance.drafts: LW-art parity, 2026-07-19, round 2 (re-curated during Worker E's finish-and-ship pass): the original seed-1043285190 winner passed curation on subject-fidelity grounds but reads visibly cel-shaded/thick-outlined on inspection -- a style-parity miss against hero-vanguard/striker/mystic's soft painterly rendering (the exact NoConceptSheet attractor the negative was meant to block, that slipped through this class's original 2-candidate round with no escalation). Re-rolled 4 fresh candidates (seed 837462951+0..+3) with a strengthened generation-time-only prompt: same Active/house/Subject/NeutralBase composition plus an emphasized painterly addendum ('painted with visible loose brush strokes ... no ink outlines, no line art, soft blended shading only') and explicit anti-lineart negatives added on top of NoConceptSheet ('ink outline, line art, manga, graphic novel illustration, poster art, hard cel shading, thick black lineart, sketch lines, bold linework'). 3 of 4 rejected: two repeated the same cel-shaded/thick-outline failure and one drew a concept-art UI panel with palette swatches (the NoConceptSheet attractor again, in a new shape).
Provenance.paintoverNote: Winner is c0 (seed+0): single hooded rogue figure, one curved blade held low, soft painterly brushwork with no ink outlines -- matches the vanguard/mystic/striker rendering style cleanly. Diverges from the original brief (dual curved blades) the same way the other two LW-art classes' winners diverge from their AssetSpec.Subject weapon phrasing -- curation prioritized style-parity and an artifact-free painterly silhouette over literal prop fidelity (see hero-occultist/hero-sentinel's provenance for the same trade-off, and U5's cave-rat/forgeworm precedent). Silhouette still reads distinct from Striker (twin short daggers, no cloak) and Occultist (straight sword, no scarf-wrap hood) via the flowing scarf-hood and single longer blade.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse; background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5), Flip-Y-OFF import convention unchanged from the hero-vanguard/striker/mystic precedent -- lit ClassFigure sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true, NeutralBaseTint=true (multiplied in-engine by ClassDefinition.ColorRgb for 'skirmisher', emerald (46,204,113)).
